compiled_state.title: Create retrospective overlay analysis script
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create a script that runs both overlays against the last 20 merged commits and generates calibration baselines.

### Implementation
1. Create plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh
2. Script selects last 20 merged commits touching security/performance-sensitive paths (using classifier patterns)
3. For each commit: run classifier, if overlay triggered run the overlay agent(s)
4. Aggregate results: trigger rate, findings per overlay, blue team dismissal rate (security), severity distribution (performance)
5. Output JSON report and markdown summary
6. Commit baselines to plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md

### Files to create
- plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh
- plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md (generated)

### Unit test exemption justification
This is a one-time calibration script with no conditional business logic to test independently. It orchestrates existing tools (classifier, overlay agents) that are individually tested. Any test would need a full git history mock which is infeasible.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh
- [ ] Script has bash -n syntax validation
  Verify: bash -n plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh
- [ ] Baselines document committed
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md
